productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Casual Brown Shoes
description: A monk-buckle lover's take on high-top formals, these blunt-toed, refined stack heeled and textured ankle boot from numero uno for men is a unque piece. Build your shoe closet around this classic style. Wear this with off-duty ensembles for a look referencing the bygone era of the Wild West. Upper Textured synthetic leather upper with overlays for the heel collar Single monk strap with a buckle across the midfoot High ankle styling Zipper on the ankle area for a customised Fit Fabric mesh lining Haul loop at the collar Outsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel Midsole EVA midsole Outsole TPU outsole with a stacked heel Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
